revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:native name|native_name}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#invoke:native name|native_name}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|''{{{2}}}''}}{{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}
{{lang|{{{1}}}|''{{{2}}}''}}{{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|'' {{{2}}} ''}}{{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|''{{{2}}}''}}{{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|''{{{2}}}''}} {{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|''{{{2}}}''}}{{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}{{{2}}}{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}{{{2}}} {{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|no||<small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}{{{2}}}{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|no||<small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: fix issues with space between name and icon
Undid revision 445165222 by [[Special:Contributions/Styath|Styath]] ([[User talk:Styath|talk]]) fixing with [[Template:if]] instead
revision.text: {{lang|{{{1}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}{{{2}}}{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}}}{{if|eq|{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{TfD|type=tiny}}{{lang|{{{1}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}{{{2}}}{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}}}{{if|eq|{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Prevent ugly link in all the articles it's used in
revision.text: <noinclude>{{TfD|type=tiny}}</noinclude>{{lang|{{{1}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}{{{2}}}{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}}}{{if|eq|{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}{{{2}}}{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}}}{{if|eq|{{{icon|}}}|no|| <small>{{language icon|{{{1}}}}}</small>}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>
{{lang|{{{1}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}{{{2}}}{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}}}{{if|eq|{{{icon|}}}|no|| {{language icon|{{{1}}}}}}} ''Name'' (language) {{documentation}}
{{lang|{{{1}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}{{{2}}}{{#ifeq:{{{italic|}}}|no||''}}}}{{if|eq|{{{icon|}}}|no|| {{language icon|{{{1}}}}}}}''Name'' (language) {{documentation}}

{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: smaller default fontsize for language name
revision.text: {{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: add optional region for [[Commonwealth of the Philippines]] to link to [[Spanish language in the Philippines]]
revision.text: {{hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}}|no|off=|#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language {{{region|}}}|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Update from sandbox ("parensize" is more accurate name, code layout)
revision.text: {{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|no|off=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |no|off= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |no|off= |{{#ifeq:{{{nbsp|}}}|no || }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Merging sandbox per TPER on talk page
revision.text: {{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=|''}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=|''}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=|}}{{{2}}}{{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=|}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: {{lang}} auto-italicizes Latn script; pass through {{lang}} |italic= values;
revision.text: {{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |italic={{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=no|{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}}}|{{{2}}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#ifexist:Template:ISO 639 name {{{1}}} |([[{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}} language|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]]) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |italic={{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=no|{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}}}|{{{2}}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{#invoke:ISO 639 name|iso_639_name|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#if:{{#invoke:ISO 639 name|iso_639_name_exists|{{{1}}}}}|({{#invoke:ISO 639 name|iso_639_name|{{{1}}}|link=yes}}) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: experiment using [[Module:Lang/sandbox]] instead of [[Module:ISO 639 name]]; see [[Template talk:Native name#using Module:ISO 639 name]];
revision.text: {{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |italic={{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=no|{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}}}|{{{2}}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{#invoke:lang/sandbox|name_from_code|{{{1}}}}}) | {{#if:{{#invoke:lang/sandbox|lang_exists|{{{1}}}}}|({{#invoke:lang/sandbox|name_from_code|{{{1}}}|link=yes}}) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |italic={{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=no|{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}}}|{{{2}}}}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{#invoke:lang|name_from_code|{{{1}}}|template=Native name}}) | {{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_code|{{{1}}}}}|({{#invoke:lang|name_from_code|{{{1}}}|template=Native name|link=yes}}) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |italic={{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=no|{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}}}|{{{2}}}|template=Native name}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{#invoke:lang|name_from_code|{{{1}}}|template=Native name}}) | {{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_code|{{{1}}}}}|({{#invoke:lang|name_from_code|{{{1}}}|template=Native name|link=yes}}) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |italic={{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=no|{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}}}|{{{2}}}|template=Native name}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1}}}|template=Native name}}) | {{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag|{{{1}}}}}|({{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1}}}|template=Native name|link=yes}}) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Fix too small font per [[MOS:FONTSIZE]]. When this template is used in infoboxes for mottoes, as it is commonly used, the text becomes too small for accessibility.
revision.text: {{Hatnote|[[Template:Native phrase]] redirects here.}}{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |italic={{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=no|{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}}}|{{{2}}}|template=Native name}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1}}}|template=Native name}}) | {{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag|{{{1}}}}}|({{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1}}}|template=Native name|link=yes}}) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{lang |{{{1}}}{{#if:{{{script|}}}|-{{{script}}}|}} |italic={{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}|off|no=no|{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}}}}|{{{2}}}|template=Native name}}{{#switch:{{{paren|{{{icon|}}}}}} |omit|off|no= |#default= {{#switch:{{{italics|{{{italic|}}}}}} |off|no= |{{#switch:{{{nbsp|}}}|omit|no=| }}}}{{#if:{{{nolink|}}} |({{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1}}}|template=Native name}}) | {{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag|{{{1}}}}}|({{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1}}}|template=Native name|link=yes}}) |(language?)}}}}}}{{Documentation}}
<includeonly>{{#invoke:native name|native_name}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:native name|native_name}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:native name|native_name}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:native name|native_name}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:native name|native_name}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:native name|native_name}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:native name|native_name}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
